_comment: Copy to rules.json and edit for your real inbox. Everything here is user-tunable; no rules are hardcoded in the agent.
vip_note: Exact addresses or @domain suffixes. VIP mail is always priority 'Now' regardless of content.

auto_organize._dry_run_note: Leave true until you trust each rule. organize.py --live overrides per-run.
auto_organize.label_map_note: Apply label (reversible) and optionally archive (removes from inbox, never deletes). Categories not listed are left untouched in the inbox.

draft_replies.skip_note: Only draft when the email actually asks something or expects a response. Never auto-send — drafts only.
